description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a light gray exterior and a dark gray gable roof. The structure features a prominent covered front porch supported by columns, and several symmetrically placed windows with black frames. The house is surrounded by a low boundary wall on one side, and landscaped with multiple coniferous trees. The roof includes dormer windows and a large chimney, adding architectural interest. The rear of the house has an open patio area, while the front entryway is accentuated by a double door and flanked by trees. The overall design is balanced and traditional, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with a gray gable roof, covered porch, dormer windows, and landscaped with coniferous trees.
description_view_0: The rear side of the house shows a large gable roof, two windows, and a covered porch with columns, flanked by two trees.
description_view_1: The left side view highlights the long side wall with a single window, the boundary wall extending from the house, and three trees in the yard.
description_view_2: The back and right side reveal the chimney, dormer windows, open patio area, and several trees surrounding the house.
description_view_3: The front view displays the main entryway with double doors, two dormer windows above, a covered porch with columns, and two large trees at the entrance.
attribute_entryway_design: Double front doors under a covered porch with columns, flanked by large trees and featuring a modest overhang.
